entries.title: B.S., Industrial and Systems Engineering
bullets: Selected coursework: linear algebra, probabilistic systems models, deterministic systems models, data science, Python programming, probability and statistics.

entries.title: Undergraduate Researcher
entries.organization: University of Cincinnati · advised by Prof. Tommaso Giovannelli
bullets: Researching mixed-integer bilevel optimization methods with derivative-free and stochastic components.
Implemented PyTorch experiments for neural architecture search and compared bilevel algorithms including DARTS, StocBiO, and derivative-free bilevel search methods.
Contributed to theoretical analysis, computational experiments, and a research manuscript in preparation.

entries.title: Summer Researcher
bullets: Built and analyzed stochastic simulations of assembly systems with flexible production enabled by 3D printing.
Studied inventory dynamics, cycle times, and throughput under different flexibility assumptions.

entries.title: Industrial and Systems Engineering Co-op
bullets: Reduced inbound inspection process time by identifying bottlenecks and implementing targeted process improvements.
Built Power BI dashboards and introduced SPC metrics for production and quality monitoring.
Expanded data tracking infrastructure to capture previously unmeasured process variables.

entries.title: Outpatient Clinic Stochastic Programming Project
bullets: Modeled scheduling decisions under patient no-shows, walk-in arrivals, and stochastic service times using a two-stage stochastic programming framework.

entries.title: Risk Assessment Model for Osteoradionecrosis
bullets: Developed a population-based risk assessment model using dose-volume histograms and pre-radiation dental extraction status.

entries.title: Programming and Tools
entries.organization: Python, R, PyTorch, NumPy, SciPy, Pandas, LaTeX, Gurobi, Excel, Jupyter Notebooks

entries.title: Technical Interests
entries.organization: Bilevel optimization, stochastic modeling, machine learning, derivative-free optimization, healthcare operations, supply chains

entries.title: Secretary
bullets: Coordinated meeting logistics, recorded minutes, and helped organize guest speaker sessions.
